description: Cross-lane price floor test on the recommended mechanism (both-dynamic-strict-threshold, window 5). The floor enforces priority coefficient >= floor x standard coefficient after every update. floor-off is the recommended config (multiplierFloor null, the setting behind all phase-2 results); floor-3 matches the prototype's demo calibration; floor-16 matches the mechanism-design doc's default. Run once per load profile (low preset, severe-congestion, launch-day) with matching --out directories
